avoid: Fly Postgres unmanaged without DB ops
decision_reason: Lowest maintenance comes from not self-hosting; if PaaS is required, Render has the clearest n8n guide and Postgres route.
required_acceptance_test: Create workflow and credential, redeploy, confirm state remains and webhook URL is public HTTPS.

secondary_recommendation: Zeabur template with verified PostgreSQL and volume
avoid: Free sleeping service for production webhook
decision_reason: Fast start matters, but public webhooks need always-on service, stable custom domain, and durable state.
required_acceptance_test: Trigger production webhook before and after redeploy; confirm WEBHOOK_URL uses custom domain.

decision_reason: Render documents n8n storage choices directly and recommends Postgres for workflow data.
required_acceptance_test: Upgrade away from free DB, pin image tag, redeploy, verify workflows credentials executions.

secondary_recommendation: External managed PostgreSQL plus Fly Volume for local files
avoid: Single Fly Volume treated as replicated storage
decision_reason: Fly is strong when the operator wants Machines and network control, but volumes and unmanaged DB choices need care.
required_acceptance_test: Check Managed Postgres, fly secrets, custom domain certificate, volume path, and restore plan.

primary_recommendation: Zeabur n8n template after state-model inspection
secondary_recommendation: Railway template after variable and volume inspection
decision_reason: Templates reduce setup time but must be inspected for PostgreSQL, volume, secrets, and domain behavior.
required_acceptance_test: After template deploy, record DB type, volume mount path, N8N_ENCRYPTION_KEY source, and redeploy result.

primary_recommendation: Railway app service plus PostgreSQL template plus volume
decision_reason: Railway is fast and flexible, but database templates remain user-operated for backups and monitoring.
required_acceptance_test: Confirm Railway variables, DATABASE_URL/DB_POSTGRESDB mapping, volume mount, backup approach, and custom domain.

primary_recommendation: Week 10 VPS plus Docker Compose plus Caddy
secondary_recommendation: Small VPS with managed external PostgreSQL
decision_reason: When state visibility matters more than dashboard simplicity, VPS makes every layer explicit.
required_acceptance_test: Run compose config, Caddy validation, DNS/firewall check, and n8n redeploy persistence check.
